title: streptylis bracteolata
intro: Streptylis bracteolata, also known as the golden ragwort or yellow ragwort, is a flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Streptylis bracteolata include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made by drying the flowers and leaves, which can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
